message:
test(uds): 14 unit tests for Unix domain socket wrapper (wa-1gl01)

Tests cover: UnixListener bind/error, UnixStream connect/error,
accept, read/write roundtrip, bidirectional communication, empty
writes, Deref/DerefMut access, raw fd and borrowed fd operations,
incoming iterator, Debug formatting, and multiple client connections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
